steps.title: Find the probability for room C
steps.content:
All visitors are in one of three rooms, so the probabilities must sum to 1.

$$P(A) + P(B) + P(C) = 1$$

$$P(C) = 1 - 0.72 - 0.24 = 0.04$$

steps.title: Calculate the number of visitors in room C
steps.content:
Multiply the probability by the total number of visitors.

$$\text{Number in C} = 0.04 \times 225 = 9$$

That matches choice B — B is correct.
